readme_markdown:
TrollXD


Are you a server with toxic management? :D ok it was a joke, but sometimes we need to have fun... Right? 🤡 ## Installation & Basic Usage—❔ * You can download the plugin as .phar from [releases](https://github.com/nepinhum/TrollXD/releases) and install it directly. You can also download it as a folder with the [download](https://github.com/nepinhum/TrollXD/archive/refs/heads/main.zip) option. Either way, all you have to do is put it in "root/plugins" * If you want to add your language: (both options) * Open the "…/plugins/TrollXD/resources/locale-data" folder and create the language file you want to add (e.g. "tr_TR.json") and then you can add your own language based on an existing one! You can also open a ["pull request"](https://github.com/nepinhum/TrollXD/pulls) if you want to contribute and share your language with other users!
Also remember to change the "defaultLanguage" parameter in "config.yml" to the filename of the new language. ## Some features ## Dependencies * [dktapps/pmforms](https://github.com/dktapps/pmforms/) * [wr3p/TranslationManager](https://github.com/wr3p/TranslationManager/) ## TODO - [ ] Rewrite the old trolls. - [ ] Add new trolls. - [ ] Something special...
